quickActions.cashTrendEmptyTitle: No cash trend for this period
quickActions.cashTrendEmptyDescription: Cash in hand and expenditure chart appears when daily sales records exist for the selected period.

weeklyMomentum.subtitleRolling: Sales and expenditure for the last 7 days.
weeklyMomentum.subtitleCalendar: Sales and expenditure for the this week.
weeklyMomentum.scopeGroupAria: Period for charts and tables below
weeklyMomentum.errorDescription: Something went wrong while fetching daily sales. Please refresh and try again.
weeklyMomentum.emptyDescription: No sale entries were found for the selected period. Add invoices or misc sales to populate this trend.

rangeComposition.title: Range Composition
rangeComposition.subtitle: Invoice, misc, and expenditure for selected period.
rangeComposition.emptyDescription: There are no invoices, misc sales, or expenditure records for the selected date range.

weeklyDetails.subtitleRolling: Pick an end date: the table shows the last 7 days through that date (newest first).
weeklyDetails.subtitleCalendar: Pick any date in the week: the table lists that calendar week’s daily rows (newest first). Week start follows Settings → Appearance.
weeklyDetails.errorDescription: Sale entries could not be loaded right now. Refresh and try again.
weeklyDetails.emptyDescription: No rows exist for the selected period. Change the date, switch Last 7 days / This week, or add a new invoice.

empty.title: Welcome to Godown Stock
empty.message: Add your first item or record a sale to see your dashboard come alive.

lowStock.itemsAtOrBelow: Items at or below their low stock threshold
lowStock.errorLoading: Error loading low stock items. Try refreshing.
lowStock.emptyDescription: All tracked items are above reorder level right now. Update reorder values in Products & Stock to get actionable alerts.

lender.emptyDescription: Lender summary appears after credit purchases or settlements are recorded.

sectionError.description: This section failed to render. You can retry without reloading the entire page.
